title: How to Place an Order
body:
Browse our menu, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You can pay online or choose Cash on Delivery.

Delivery typically takes 20-40 minutes depending on your location and order volume.

title: How Baby Coins Work
body:
Earn Baby Coins on every order. 1 coin = ₹1. Redeem coins for free items, delivery waivers, and more from the Rewards page.

Healthy Mode orders earn 2x coins!

title: How to Cancel an Order
body: You can cancel within 5 minutes of placing your order from the order tracking page. After that, cancellation may not be possible as preparation begins immediately.

title: Student Pass FAQ
body: The Student Pass gives verified students an automatic discount on every order. Apply from the Student Pass page with your enrollment number and institution name.

title: Accepted Payment Methods
body: We accept UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, EMI, and Cash on Delivery. All online payments are processed securely via Razorpay.

title: Delivery Areas
body: We deliver within 10km of any of our 6 Abc City outlets. Enter your address at checkout to check availability. Free delivery on orders above ₹499.
